MINI MINUTES: William Coke, Esq. appearing for defendant; no appearance for plaintiff. Notice having been given and there being no appearance by plaintiff, or objection filed, the Court orders the case dismissed with prejudice pursuant to California Rules of Court Section 3.1385. JUDGE: SAMUEL K. FENG; Clerk: GGonzales; Proceedings not reported.
